title: Blexs Earth
description:
This Modpack is made for the Blexs Earth SMP!

This is made for a Private SMP with my friends but if you care, you can use the Mods too! Nothing really special about it just ads some QoL and Multiplayer additions such as Simple Voice Chat.
body:
This Modpack is made for the Blexs Earth SMP!

This is made for a Private SMP with my friends but if you care, you can use the Mods too! Nothing really special about it just ads some QoL and Multiplayer additions such as Simple Voice Chat.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7372804edd8066e296660988e43478e6440b83a1.png)

 

Immersive Mods:
AmbinetSounds 6: Adds ambient sounds to increase immersion.
Sodium/Iris: Comes with 4 shaderpacks and even more optimization to your game.

 

Multiplayer Mods:

Simple Voice Chat: Allows proximity chat with your friends in Multiplayer.
Chat Heads: You can see the heads of the players in chat!

QOL Mods:

Better UI: Adds Better Stats menu and F3 Menu
Jade: You can see info on the block/entity you are looking at in the world!


And More
